report.summary: Audited 2 new pages from build v9 (Scroll zkEVM, Morpho Protocol), fixed 10 UX issues across both pages, and created 2 missing OG images (1200x630) with updated metadata references.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Scroll page: Changed h1 fontSize from hardcoded 48px to responsive clamp(1.8rem, 5vw, 3rem) for mobile readability
Scroll page: Added aria-label='Breadcrumb' and changed breadcrumb wrapper from div to semantic nav element
Scroll page: Changed TOC from div to semantic nav element with aria-label='Table of Contents'
Scroll page: Added minHeight: 44px touch targets on all 10 TOC links for mobile usability (WCAG 2.5.8)
Scroll page: Added scrollBehavior: 'smooth' to page root for smooth TOC anchor navigation
Scroll page: Wrapped comparison table in overflowX: 'auto' container with minWidth: 600px for mobile horizontal scroll
Morpho page: Changed h1 fontSize from hardcoded 42px to responsive clamp(1.8rem, 5vw, 2.625rem) for mobile readability
Morpho page: Added aria-label='Breadcrumb' and changed breadcrumb wrapper from div to semantic nav element
Morpho page: Added aria-label='Table of Contents' to TOC nav element
Morpho page: Changed TOC grid to responsive repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr)) so it collapses to single column on mobile
Morpho page: Added minHeight: 44px with flex alignment on TOC links for mobile touch targets
Morpho page: Added scrollBehavior: 'smooth' to page root for smooth TOC anchor navigation

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: scroll-zkevm (1200x630) — Indigo/cyan gradient theme with ZK proof node network visualization, circuit board pattern, TVL/txns/dApps stats row, Layer 2 + zkEVM badges. Saved to /public/og-scroll-zkevm.svg

OG image: morpho-protocol (1200x630) — Blue/purple DeFi theme with Morpho Blue isolated markets grid visualization (6 markets with APY rates), MetaMorpho vault label, institutional adoption badges (ETH Foundation, Apollo Global), TVL/markets/ranking stats. Saved to /public/og-morpho-protocol.svg

sections.title: Metadata Fixes
items: Updated Scroll page openGraph and twitter image references from non-existent og-scroll-zkevm.png to og-scroll-zkevm.svg
Updated Morpho page openGraph and twitter image references from non-existent og-morpho.jpg to og-morpho-protocol.svg
